name: Qwen1.5-72B
license: Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT (custom, free commercial use below usage threshold)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer, 80 layers, standard multi-head attention (SwiGLU, RMSNorm, attention QKV bias)
note: Gen-1.5 flagship with a uniform 32K context across the whole lineup, but at 72B this model uses standard multi-head attention, not GQA (config: num_key_value_heads = num_attention_heads = 64) — GQA in Qwen1.5 was applied only to the 32B/110B sizes.
tpsNote: Q4 weights (~48GB) exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM; requires multi-GPU or CPU/disk offload.
